text: Drax Group plc makes formal offer at 92.574p per share, after formal sale process
Castlelake considering a possible offer - no price given but would need to be at least 403.23p
Scheme document published. Meetings scheduled for 24 June 2026.
Indicative offer from Fattal Hotel Group at £22 per share. Follows strategic review and formal sale process.
Trading update - trading in line with expectations. FY 2026 outlook maintained.
